ocr_findings.description: Header glyph '試験にはコしが出る！' — the stylized logo rendered in OCR as 'つしが出る！' losing the distinctive 'コし(ここ)' emphasis mark. Meaning is preserved but key visual element misread.
Page footer shows printed page number 498 but file is page_514.jpg (PDF page vs textbook page offset — consistent with pipeline design, not an OCR error).

reviewer_notes: Exam-tip summary box listing 9 security threat definitions (ソーシャルエンジニアリング, マルウェア, ボット, etc.). Text coverage is complete. The stylized header logo glyph is a cosmetic rendering issue; all substantive bullet content captured accurately.
